 {"id":"bd-736d","title":"Refactor path canonicalization into helper function","description":"The path canonicalization logic (filepath.Abs + EvalSymlinks) is duplicated in 3 places:
- beads.go:131-137 (BEADS_DIR handling)
- cmd/bd/main.go:446-451 (--no-db cleanup)
- cmd/bd/nodb.go:26-31 (--no-db initialization)

Refactoring suggestion:
Extract to a helper function like:
  func canonicalizePath(path string) string

This would:
- Reduce code duplication
- Make the logic easier to maintain
- Ensure consistent behavior across all path handling

 {"id":"bd-73got","title":"Refactor beads-release formula to use gate step","description":"Update beads-release.formula.toml to use gate-based async for CI wait:

Replace the spin-wait `wait-ci` step with a proper gate step:

```toml
[[steps]]
id = "wait-ci"
title = "Await CI completion"
needs = ["push-tag"]
gate = "gh:run"
gate_hint = "release.yml"
timeout = "30m"
description = """
Gate step awaiting GitHub Actions release workflow.
Resolves automatically when workflow succeeds.
Escalates if workflow fails or times out.

No polling needed - Deacon patrol evaluates gates periodically.
"""
```

Depends on gate infrastructure being complete.

 {"id":"bd-74eak","title":"Review & merge PR #1026: fix(init) prevent init from worktrees","description":"dispatched_by: beads/crew/emma

Review and merge PR #1026: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/1026

## Summary
Prevents 'bd init' from running inside a git worktree. Worktrees should share the .beads database from the main repository.

## Changes
- Adds check in cmd/bd/init.go
- Error message guides users to use main repo or bd worktree create

## Review Checklist
- [ ] Pull the branch locally
- [ ] Run tests: go test ./...
- [ ] Verify the worktree check works correctly
- [ ] Merge with gh pr merge 1026 --repo steveyegge/beads --squash","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"beads/crew/dave","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-11T18:14:05.979279-08:00","created_by":"beads/crew/emma","updated_at":"2026-01-11T18:16:06.880893-08:00","closed_at":"2026-01-11T18:16:06.880893-08:00","close_reason":"PR #1026 reviewed, approved, and merged. Prevents bd init from running in git worktrees with helpful error message."}
